title: astragalus baftensis
intro: Astragalus baftensis, also known as Persian milkvetch, is a plant species native to Iran and Afghanistan, belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus baftensis include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Astragalus baftensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
